steps.title: Recognize that all probabilities sum to 1
steps.content:
The three theaters account for all customers. Therefore:
$$P(A) + P(B) + P(C) = 1$$

steps.title: Calculate the probability for theater C
Convert probability to number of customers
steps.content:
Multiply the probability by the total number of customers:
$$0.28 \times 350 = 98$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
